Units of Measurement for C# and C++ applications.
Copyright (©) MAN. This program is provided to you under the terms
of the license as published at https://github.com/mangh/Metrology.

Unit and Scale Generator, Version: 2.0.3.0

Missing or invalid command line arguments

Usage: UnitGenerator targetLanguage targetNamespace templateFolder targetFolder [--with-models]

  targetLanguage  : CS | CPP.

  targetNamespace : namespace string, e.g.:
                    "Demo.Metrology" for CS language,
                    "Demo::Metrology" for CPP language,

  templateFolder  : path to the folder containing definitions and templates,

  targetFolder    : path to the target folder for generated units and scales,

  --with-models   : request to save intermediate models in files (in
                    the targetFolder)

FAILED: errors have occurred.
